mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in >65% of periods when FEDFUNDS increases, or Rank IC < 0.02 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending economic contraction, triggering risk-off flows that produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power when UNRATE growth exceeds 0.5pp.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP growth and stable consumer price inflation indicates robust aggregate demand without overheating, supporting corporate profit margins and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in >55% of cases, or the interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the index of industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing and utility output, generating short-term positive momentum in equity markets over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >60% of periods following INDPRO increases, or the signal fails during supply-constrained regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation forces markets to price in aggressive monetary tightening and erodes real consumer purchasing power, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >65% of triggered months, or the signal shows no predictive power when inflation accelerates above 0.6% MoM.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales figures directly correlate with increased corporate revenue streams and consumer spending resilience, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in >60% of periods when RSAFS increases, or Rank IC remains below 0.01 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms broad-based labor market strength, boosting investor confidence and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative forward returns in >55% of observations, or the interaction effect vanishes when payrolls growth falls below 100k.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in housing starts signals weakening construction activity and broader economic slowdown, triggering immediate risk aversion and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >60% of triggered instances, or the signal fails to predict returns when HOUST declines are driven by seasonal adjustments.
